description_long: This is a brick house with a dark, multi-gabled roof and a prominent front-facing garage. The front yard features a paved driveway, manicured lawn, and several mature trees and shrubs, bordered by a low hedge. Large windows are distributed across the sides and rear, providing ample natural light to the interior. The rear of the house opens onto a patio area with outdoor furniture, suggesting a space for relaxation or entertaining. The main entryway is set back from the garage, marked by a small stoop and a single front door with sidelights. The overall design is suburban and practical, blending traditional and modern residential elements.
description: A brick suburban house with a dark gabled roof, attached garage, large windows, and landscaped front and back yards.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage, main entryway, driveway, and landscaped front yard with trees and hedges.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the brick facade, multiple windows, and the transition from the front yard to the backyard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the patio area with outdoor furniture, large windows, and backyard landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows and the expanse of the brick exterior, with trees and hedges along the perimeter.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Single front door with sidelights, small stoop, and no porch, set back from the garage
